Industrial AI Platform · Norway & EU

Norway's industrial
assets, waste streams,
and decommissions —
converted into value.

Ablny Technologies AS is an AI platform company headquartered in Stavanger, Norway. We build intelligence that converts stranded NCS assets, agricultural waste, and organic byproducts into measurable commercial returns — for operators, investors, and EU consortium partners across the Nordic–European industrial economy.

Why it matters

Industry sits on trillions
in unrealised value.

Ageing infrastructure, organic waste streams, and stranded assets represent the largest untapped opportunity in the Nordic–European industrial economy. Conventional approaches lack the analytical depth to find and systematically unlock it.

$4T+
Stranded industrial assets globally

Ageing infrastructure, idle equipment, and decommissioned assets carrying significant recoverable value — untouched by intelligent discovery, matching, and reuse systems.

80%
Agricultural & food waste never monetised

From Norwegian seafood processing to arable crop residues — organic byproduct streams are discarded rather than converted to energy, products, or carbon credit revenue.

2035
NCS decommissioning wave

The Norwegian Continental Shelf faces its largest-ever asset retirement cycle. Reuse-before-rebuild decisions require physics-grounded intelligence at scale.

What we do

Three solutions.
One intelligent platform.

AssetX™ is Ablny's AI platform. It operates across energy, agriculture, and secure cloud — delivering intelligence engines built on mathematics, chemistry, and physics, not generic machine learning defaults.

Energy & NCS
⚙️

AssetX Energy

AI-driven well integrity assessment, predictive asset health monitoring, and decommissioning intelligence for the Norwegian Continental Shelf. Identifies reuse potential and repurpose pathways before costly asset retirement — validated against authoritative NCS reference datasets.

  • Digital Twin
  • Anomaly Detection
  • Carbon Intelligence
  • Integrity Scoring
Request briefing →
Sovereign Cloud
🔒

OCI Zero Trust

Enterprise-grade sovereign cloud architecture on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure — built for regulated energy and industrial environments. Zero Trust across six enforced layers: identity, supply chain, network, data sovereignty, runtime, and audit observability. FIPS 140-2 Level 3 certified.

  • Zero Trust
  • FIPS 140-2 L3
  • Policy-as-Code
  • SIEM
  • OCI Oslo Region
Request briefing →
Agriculture & Carbon
🌱

AssetX Agri & BioVal

Waste-to-value intelligence for agricultural operations and food processing. Converts crop residues, organic waste, and seafood processing byproducts into biogas, compost, biofertilisers, or carbon credit revenue — with active Norwegian Research Council programme applications in progress.

  • Bioprocess Optimisation
  • Yield Prediction
  • Carbon Credit Engine
  • EU ETS
  • LCA Dashboard
Request briefing →
How we deliver

Four ways we create returns.

Every AssetX™ engagement unlocks multiple stacked revenue streams from the same asset base.

🔍
Reuse

AI health scoring identifies assets suitable for secondary deployment before they enter retirement — extending productive life and deferring capital expenditure.

🔄
Repurpose

Cross-sector asset matching connects industrial equipment to new applications in energy, agriculture, and food processing that owners cannot surface in isolation.

⚗️
Convert

Science-grounded engines validate every waste-to-product conversion pathway — biogas, biomass, biofertiliser, or energy — before commitment of capital.

💰
Monetise

Carbon credits, circular revenues, and SaaS licensing. Multiple stacked revenue streams unlocked per engagement, consolidated into a single dashboard view.

Platform depth

Built on science.
Not defaults.

Our intelligence engines operate at the intersection of mathematics, chemistry, and physics — purpose-built for industrial asset complexity. Full technical documentation is available to qualified partners and investors under NDA.

🔐
Six Proprietary Intelligence Engines

AssetX™ is powered by six purpose-built engines spanning mathematics, physics, chemistry, statistics, AI/Graph, and financial modelling. Methodology details, architecture specifications, and validation results are available to qualified partners and investors under a signed NDA.

Mathematics
Stochastic Optimisation
Asset routing · Decommissioning sequencing · Offtake scheduling
Physics
Conservation-Constrained ML
Well integrity · Bioprocess control · Drift monitoring
Chemistry
Reaction Kinetics Engine
Fermentation modelling · Yield prediction · Carbon eligibility
Statistics
Hybrid Temporal Modelling
Anomaly detection · State classification · Emissions monitoring
AI / Graph
Asset Discovery Graph
Cross-sector reuse matching · Supply chain intelligence
Finance
Carbon Revenue Model
EU ETS valuation · Carbon credit forecasting · ESG allocation
Request Technical Briefing Under NDA →

Regulatory readiness

Compliant from day one.
Not retrofitted.

We designed for EU regulatory requirements, not towards them. Every platform component was built to operate in regulated energy and industrial environments.

⚖️
EU AI Act · Reg. 2024/1689
AI Act Compliance

High-risk framework governance. Every model includes conformity assessment, technical documentation, human oversight mechanisms, and AI decision logging.

🔒
NIST SP 800-207
Zero Trust Architecture

Six-layer Zero Trust enforcement across OCI Sovereign Cloud. No implicit trust regardless of network location. Continuous identity and workload verification.

🛡️
GDPR · EU Data Sovereignty
Privacy by Design

All data hosted exclusively in OCI Oslo Region — never leaving EU/EEA jurisdiction. Customer-managed encryption keys (FIPS 140-2 Level 3 HSM).

📋
NIS2 Directive
Critical Infrastructure Scope

Energy platforms and EPCIC systems comply with NIS2 critical infrastructure requirements: incident detection, supply chain security, and MFA across all privileged access.

🔗
XAI · Transparency
Explainable AI

Feature attribution on yield predictions. Confidence intervals on digital twin outputs. Human operators can override any AI recommendation at any time.

🔐
Secure DevOps
Software Supply Chain

Immutable pipelines with cryptographic signing, SBOM generation, and continuous vulnerability scanning. IaC drift detection prevents unauthorised changes.

Who we work with

Institutional backing.
Industry access.

Our partnerships span academic research, energy clusters, and analytics delivery — providing both scientific validation and direct routes to market.

University of Stavanger
R&D Research Partner

Embedded collaboration with UiS Faculty of Science & Technology across digital twin engineering, AI commercialisation, and industrial chemistry. Research outputs feed directly into AssetX engine validation.

Energy Transition Norway
Strategic Cluster Partner

Active collaboration with ETN — Norway's Arena Pro energy cluster — on offshore asset circular economy pathways. Structured access to NCS operators and decommissioning decision-makers.

Nordic Edge
Agritech Industry Access

Cluster membership providing structured access to Norwegian farm operators and food processors, supporting agricultural AI and waste valorisation applications across Rogaland and Southwest Norway.

Trellisi
Core Analytics Partner · UK

Advanced data science, business intelligence, and digital transformation capabilities. Trellisi's data engineering expertise directly complements AssetX's AI and digital twin infrastructure.

PennyTrust Global
EMEA Fintech Partner

Established fintech delivery expertise and EMEA financial networks supporting Ablny's carbon credit monetisation pathways and circular economy revenue flows.

Norwegian Research Council
Active Programme Applications

AssetX development is supported by Norges Forskningsråd competitive research programmes — with active applications submitted across seafood, agriculture, and industrial AI verticals.

EU Horizon Europe

Building the European
circular economy — together.

Ablny is actively developing EU Horizon Europe consortium partnerships across the Nordic–European bioeconomy, circular agriculture, and industrial AI landscape. We bring the intelligence stack; we seek partners with complementary domain expertise, operational assets, and cross-border reach.

What we bring

Multi-domain AI engines, validated industrial datasets, regulatory compliance infrastructure, UiS academic pipeline, and active NFR programme applications.

Who we seek

Research institutions, industrial operators, SMEs, and technology providers across agriculture, food processing, offshore energy, and bioeconomy in Norway and EU member states.

Current focus

HORIZON-CL6 circular bioeconomy calls and Norwegian Research Council programmes. Contact us to discuss consortium positioning and work package alignment.

Get in touch

Let's build
the circular economy together.

Delivery Network
Engineered and delivered from the Nordics to EMEA.

Ablny's engineers and researchers work alongside our core delivery partners — PennyTrust and Trellisi — to bring integrated solutions from strategy through to deployment. Together we cover AI platform engineering, enterprise architecture, and managed service delivery across Norway, the Nordic region, and EMEA.
